scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,gateway,desktop -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:core: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet run --project src/TinadecCore/TinadecCore.csproj --urls http://127.0.0.1:48731"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet build TinadecOffice.slnx --no-restore"
scripts.build:native: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$toolchain = 'D:\tools\rust\rustup\toolchains\stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm'; $cargo = if ($env:CARGO) { $env:CARGO } else { Join-Path $toolchain 'bin\cargo.exe' }; $env:PATH = (Join-Path $toolchain 'bin') + ';' + (Join-Path $toolchain 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm\bin') + ';' + (Join-Path $toolchain 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm\bin\gcc-ld') + ';' + (Join-Path 'D:\tools\rust\rustup\toolchains\stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu' 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnu\lib\self-contained') + ';' + $env:PATH; & $cargo build --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml"
scripts.build:native:release: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$toolchain = 'D:\tools\rust\rustup\toolchains\stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm'; $cargo = if ($env:CARGO) { $env:CARGO } else { Join-Path $toolchain 'bin\cargo.exe' }; $env:PATH = (Join-Path $toolchain 'bin') + ';' + (Join-Path $toolchain 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm\bin') + ';' + (Join-Path $toolchain 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnullvm\bin\gcc-ld') + ';' + (Join-Path 'D:\tools\rust\rustup\toolchains\stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu' 'lib\rustlib\x86_64-pc-windows-gnu\lib\self-contained') + ';' + $env:PATH; & $cargo build --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml --release"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet test TinadecOffice.slnx --no-build"
scripts.restore:dotnet: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet restore TinadecOffice.slnx"
